## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan aggressive SEO strategy for HeyGen to rapidly catch up to competitors and win the market.](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HeyGen aims to increase organic traffic by 50%+ in 6 months, targeting 50+ priority keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Proposed $60k/month engagement with fwd.digital, including dedicated engineer and aggressive content creation](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-value tool pages (e.g., video conversion) to drive traffic and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Potential for HeyGen to provide video API access to fwd.digital for enhanced content creation](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges and Strategy

  - [fwd.digital facing scaling issues with AirOps workflows (4,000+ tasks)](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Moving away from editors building workflows to a more streamlined, error-proof UI](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [HeyGen wants to be aggressive in SEO growth, aiming to catch up to competitors quickly](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Proposal includes 1,500 pages/month, with flexibility to adjust focus between creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

### Content Creation and Tools

  - [Focus on creating valuable tool pages (e.g., video transcription, compression) to drive traffic and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Example: Veed.io generates 7% of traffic from video compressor tool](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Potential to leverage HeyGen's upcoming video creation API for unique content offerings](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### Collaboration and Resources

  - [fwd.digital proposing dedicated team: growth expert (Jimmy), engineer, and partial CTO time](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Considering performance-based bonuses to motivate the team (e.g., milestones for 50% and 100% growth)](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [HeyGen to provide workflows and potentially API access to augment fwd.digital's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### Agency Directory and Outreach

  - [Plan to create an agency directory (24,000 video agencies) for outbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Directory to feature agencies that join HeyGen's program, creating incentive for participation](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Outreach strategy: Offer to feature agencies, request feedback, and invite them to join the program](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Investment and Expectations

  - [Proposed $60k/month engagement, including dedicated engineer ($9k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [HeyGen looking to reallocate budget from other vendors (e.g., cutting Siege) to invest in this partnership](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Need to quantify expected results: number of pages, new organic keywords, and overall lift in traffic](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to update proposal with monthly breakdown and focus areas (agency directory, video glossary, blog)](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Nav to present proposal to HeyGen CEO, emphasizing value realization and speed of execution](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Aim for agreement by Monday to allow for January 13th kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Discuss potential for HeyGen to provide video API access to fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Explore performance-based bonus structure for aggressive growth targets](https://fathom.video/share/_KxH_U8rwxP2ksaAsogSQ2Ain8mxkJk6?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
